sentences.english: When I first moved abroad, I was extremely homesick.
sentences.korean: 처음 해외로 이사했을 때 극심한 향수병을 앓았어요.

sentences.english: I missed my mom's cooking the most.
I don't really get homesick that often, but sometimes I miss the food from my hometown.
sentences.korean: 향수병을 자주 앓진 않지만 가끔 고향 음식이 그리워요.

sentences.english: There's this little restaurant I used to go to every week.
I get homesick around the holidays, especially Christmas.
sentences.korean: 명절 즈음에 향수병이 생겨요, 특히 크리스마스에요.

sentences.english: That's when I really want to be with my family.
sentences.korean: 그때 정말 가족과 함께 있고 싶어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
